notes: Overall Survival Kaplan-Meier (PROC LIFETEST plots=survival, OUTSURV=, %km_pt point-estimate macro, PROC PRINT of os_est). External libraw.gml219 read replaced by a 42-row synthetic GML219 dataset in autoexec with the same columns the program reads (FASFL, OS_y, os_c); Windows libname/%working_dir/proc printto/ods rtf plumbing removed. Survival logic, OUTSURV handling, %km_pt macro and final print are upstream-verbatim.
